name: Ooh!Media Limited
analysis: OML has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 16% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.4600, stop A$1.3167, target A$1.8899 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
